Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts brake parts catalog, promotions, and product details to inform email content.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls incoming support tickets from HubSpot, including customer details, order info, and issue descriptions.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using target keywords to discover content creators, influencers, and relevant social profiles across platforms.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches each backorder line item with the live inventory data, flags dead-end parts that have no available source or ETA, and prioritizes items by urgency.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static spreadsheet into an actionable status dashboard, instantly surfacing the most critical issues that need human attention.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for each backorder scenario — updates for parts in transit, alternatives for dead-end parts, and revised ETAs for on-order items.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Customer service reps receive pre-written, context-specific emails ready for review and send, dramatically reducing response time and ensuring consistent communication.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract their complete two-piece rotor listings organized by make, model, and year fitment.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Eliminates the tedious manual process of browsing three separate manufacturer websites and copying data, capturing comprehensive competitor catalog data in minutes.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor rotor data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor inventory to identify overlapping coverage and untapped market opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly where DFC already competes and where new product introductions could capture market share, turning raw data into a strategic product gap analysis.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers to gather demand signals and purchase interest for two-piece rotors across specific vehicle applications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects real-world demand data directly from customers before committing to inventory decisions, reducing the risk of stocking parts with low sell-through.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalogs, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino for review.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Dino receives one consolidated, decision-ready document combining competitor intelligence, internal coverage, and customer demand — everything needed to make product line decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad campaigns across Meta and TikTok, extracting every piece of ad copy including headlines, descriptions, primary text, and call-to-action fields.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides instant visibility across all running ad creative without anyone manually clicking through dozens of campaigns and ad sets in multiple platforms.

Meta Investigation.action: Searches all extracted ad copy for specified target phrases, identifies exact matches and close variants, and records the precise field and ad where each match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches compliance issues, outdated messaging, or unauthorized claims across hundreds of ads in seconds — a task that would take hours of manual review per audit.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a structured flagged-item report listing every match with the campaign name, ad name, exact field, and the full copy snippet containing the flagged phrase.
Meta Investigation.impact: The team receives a clear, actionable audit report they can immediately act on to update or remove problematic ad copy, ensuring brand and legal compliance.

summary: Here's this week's update on our AI automation pipeline. We're tracking **53 total agents** — **24 completed**, **9 in progress**, and **20 planned**. This week we added four new agents to the pipeline: the **Cerritos Building Sublet Agent**, a daily lead-gen tool finding local businesses for our Midway Place sublet; **R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI**, which will help optimize Amazon ad campaigns across both brands; **R1 Video Clipper**; and **Paid Channel Chat Bot**. On the progress front, **Agent Tracker Agent V2** moved to Completed, giving us a polished new version of our weekly agent tracking updates. Steady momentum across the board — more updates coming next week!
